decks.notes: This deck focuses on quickly enchanting small creatures with auras to make them big threats on the battlefield. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with powerful, hexproof creatures while gaining life and evasion through auras like Rancor, Armadillo Cloak, and Ethereal Armor. The deck aims to establish a strong board presence early on and maintain pressure throughout the game, utilizing cards like Slippery Bogle and Gladecover Scout to dodge removal spells. Overall, the strategy revolves around buffing up creatures with auras to create a formidable aggro force.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card draw. By using cards like Counterspell, Skred, and Brainstorm, the player aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while maintaining card advantage. The deck also includes versatile cards like Murmuring Mystic and Relic of Progenitus to generate value and disrupt graveyard strategies. The mana base includes snow-covered lands for additional synergy with cards like Skred. Overall, this deck aims to control the game and outvalue the opponent through efficient spell usage and resource management.

The main focus of this deck is to efficiently play low-cost artifacts through abilities like "Affinity" to quickly build a strong board presence and deal damage to the opponent. The deck includes various artifacts that can be played for free or at a reduced cost, along with spells like Galvanic Blast and Lightning Bolt to target the opponent directly. The inclusion of cards like Blood Fountain and Reckoner's Bargain helps to maintain card advantage and keep the pressure on the opponent. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy.

The deck focuses on quickly playing low-cost creatures to deal damage along with burn spells to finish off opponents. The goal is to overwhelm opponents with a combination of creature attacks and direct damage spells while utilizing cards like Faithless Looting to filter through the deck for key cards. The deck aims to maintain a consistent pace of aggression to pressure opponents into making mistakes or running out of resources. The key strategy is to efficiently deal damage early on and close out the game before opponents can stabilize.

The main concept of the deck is to quickly fill the graveyard with creatures using cards like Balustrade Spy and Mesmeric Fiend, then return them to the battlefield with Dread Return to overwhelm the opponent with a large number of creatures. The deck also uses cards like Elves of Deep Shadow and Gatecreeper Vine to ramp up mana and generate card advantage, while cards like Generous Ent and Lead the Stampede help with card draw and creature selection. Overall, the goal is to create a powerful combo engine that can win the game in a single turn.

This deck focuses on building a strong board presence with fast mana generation through elf creatures. By utilizing various mana dorks like Llanowar Elves and Birchlore Rangers, the deck aims to quickly ramp into powerful creatures like Priest of Titania and Timberwatch Elf. The deck also includes card draw spells like Winding Way and Lead the Stampede to ensure a steady stream of threats on the battlefield. With a focus on aggressive plays and overwhelming the opponent with a swarm of elves, this deck aims to win the game through sheer numbers and efficient mana usage.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent by using aggressive creatures like Voldaren Epicure and Kessig Flamebreather, as well as cards that deal direct damage like Lava Dart and Lightning Bolt. The burn spells like Fireblast and Fiery Temper are also key in putting pressure on the opponent. The deck includes cards like Faithless Looting and Grab the Prize to draw into more burn spells and maintain card advantage. Overall, the goal is to efficiently burn the opponent's life total down to zero as quickly as possible.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of low-cost creatures, known as weenies, in order to quickly deal damage and gain control of the game. By utilizing cards like Thraben Inspector and Novice Inspector to generate card advantage and Kor Skyfisher to reuse valuable creatures, this aggro deck aims to outpace the opponent and secure a victory. In addition, cards like Battle Screech and Ramosian Rally provide additional ways to buff up the army of weenies for a final push to victory.

The deck focuses on quickly deploying artifact creatures and utilizing cheap spells to deal damage to the opponent. By combining aggressive creatures like Glaze Fiend and Myr Enforcer with efficient removal spells like Galvanic Blast and Lightning Bolt, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with threats while maintaining card advantage through cards like Ichor Wellspring. The inclusion of cards like Refurbished Familiar and Drossforge Bridge also allows for additional value and potential for explosive turns. Overall, the deck aims to be fast, resilient, and proactive in its game plan.

The primary focus of this deck is to quickly assemble a combination of Goblin creatures that synergize with each other to deal a significant amount of damage to the opponent. By flooding the board with Goblins and utilizing cards like Goblin Bushwhacker and Goblin Grenade, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and finish the game in a few swift turns. The inclusion of burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast provides additional reach to close out the game if the opponent manages to stabilize.

The Gruul Aggro deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly to play aggressive creatures and disruption spells. By utilizing mana ramp cards like Arbor Elf, Utopia Sprawl, and Wild Growth, the deck aims to play cards like Avenging Hunter, Annoyed Altisaur, and Boarding Party ahead of schedule. Writhing Chrysalis and Suplex provide removal options, while Mwonvuli Acid-Moss and Thermokarst disrupt opponent's mana base. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with powerful creatures and disrupt their game plan with removal and land destruction spells.

The main focus of this Gruul Aggro deck is to quickly ramp up mana with cards like Arbor Elf, Utopia Sprawl, and Wild Growth, enabling you to play powerful creatures early on. Writhing Chrysalis and Avenging Hunter provide aggressive threats, while Malevolent Rumble and Generous Ent offer removal and combat tricks. Eldrazi Repurposer and Colossal Dreadmask provide additional utility and resilience to your aggressive strategy. Thermokarst and Mwonvuli Acid-Moss disrupt your opponent's mana base, giving you a strategic advantage. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm your opponent with efficient creatures and disruptive spells.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent through a combination of creatures and burn spells. By utilizing efficient creatures like Voldaren Epicure and Sneaky Snacker, along with direct damage spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast, the deck aims to aggressively reduce the opponent's life total. Additionally, cards like Faithless Looting and Grab the Prize help with card advantage and digging for key pieces. Overall, this deck prioritizes speed and relentless aggression to overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. By utilizing cards like Voldaren Epicure, Sneaky Snacker, and Kessig Flamebreather, the deck aims to deal damage rapidly. Supporting spells such as Lightning Bolt, Lava Dart, and Fiery Temper provide additional direct damage to finish off opponents. Fireblast serves as a potent finisher, while cards like Faithless Looting and Grab the Prize help maintain card advantage and fuel the burn spells. Highway Robbery offers an additional aggressive option to ensure victory against the opponent.

The deck focuses on playing cheap, aggressive creatures like Delver of Secrets and Tolarian Terror to quickly overwhelm the opponent. The goal is to efficiently use low-cost spells like Mental Note, Thought Scour, and Brainstorm to fuel the graveyard for cards like Cryptic Serpent. Control elements like Counterspell and Dispel help protect the aggressive creatures, while Vapor Snag provides tempo advantage. Sleep of the Dead can stall the opponent's board, allowing for a final push to victory. The deck aims to maintain board presence and apply pressure without giving the opponent time to recover.

The key concept of this deck is to utilize the Urzatron lands (Urza's Tower, Urza's Mine, Urza's Power Plant) to ramp up mana quickly and control the game through card draw and removal spells. The deck focuses on generating value through sacrificing artifacts, gaining card advantage, and managing opponent's threats with removal spells like Cast Down and Eviscerator's Insight. The goal is to establish board control while slowly building towards a powerful finish with cards like Evincar's Justice.
